# Apso - Agent-Driven Backend Generation

> Apso turns a schema into a production-ready backend in NestJS, FastAPI, or Go. You own every line.

## What Apso Does

Apso is a backend-as-a-service platform that generates production-ready REST API backends from schema definitions. You define your data model in a .apsorc file, and Apso generates a complete backend with entities, migrations, CRUD endpoints, authentication, multi-tenancy, and AWS deployment in the language of your choice.

## Key Differentiators

- Code ownership: Real NestJS, FastAPI, or Go source code in your repo. No vendor runtime.
- Multi-language: TypeScript, Python, Go backends from the same schema.
- BYOA (Bring Your Own Auth): Plug in BetterAuth, Auth0, Clerk, Cognito, or API keys.
- Deterministic generation: Same schema produces the same backend every time.
- MCP server: AI agents can drive Apso through Model Context Protocol.
- Schema-first: One .apsorc file is the source of truth for the entire backend.

## How It Works

1. Define your schema in .apsorc (JSON)
2. Run the CLI or let an agent drive it through MCP
3. Deploy to AWS (Lambda, RDS, API Gateway)

## Links

- Website: https://apso.ai
- App: https://app.apso.cloud
- Docs: https://docs.apso.ai
- GitHub: https://github.com/apsoai
- CLI: npm install -g @apso/cli

## Pricing

- Free: CLI generation free forever, 1 hosted service
- Pro: ~$25/service/mo (always-on, backups, custom domain, 100 credits)
- Team: ~$99/mo flat (unlimited members, RBAC, service catalog)
- Enterprise: Custom (SSO, audit logs, SOC 2, SLA)
- BYOC: ~$40/service/mo + your cloud costs

## Company

Built by Mavric Technology, LLC.
